data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
data.description: Enhanced security through multi-factor authentication for user accounts to prevent unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Implemented via integrated third-party authentication providers.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Encryption methodologies are employed to protect sensitive data both at rest and in transit.
data.technical_spec: AES-256 encryption for data at rest, TLS/SSL for data in transit.

data.title: Security Information and Event Management (SIEM)
data.description: Proactive threat detection and response mechanisms through a SIEM system.
data.technical_spec: Deployment of tools like Splunk or other SIEM platforms for real-time monitoring.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Periodic audits and penetration testing to uncover vulnerabilities and enhance security posture.
data.technical_spec: Engagement of third-party cybersecurity firms for unbiased audits.

data.title: Zero Trust Architecture
data.description: Adoption of a Zero Trust security framework to safeguard network resources and data.
data.technical_spec: Verification of every user and device via micro-segmentation and least privilege access controls.
